response.justification: While the candidate possesses over 15 years of solid software engineering experience, including high-throughput systems and recent AI infrastructure work, the resume entirely lacks the core domain expertise required for this role. A Principal IC6 in Growth and Experimentation must have a proven track record architecting A/B testing frameworks, telemetry foundations, and feature-flighting systems, none of which are demonstrated in this profile.
strengths: Over 15 years of polyglot engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TDD, CI/CD, and system architecture.
Proven experience scaling high-throughput systems, such as handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, aligning with preferred qualifications.
concerns: Zero demonstrated experience architecting experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or rollout automation systems.
Lacks background in growth engineering, product telemetry, and statistical data analysis.
Leadership scope appears limited to Senior/Staff level within specific teams, lacking evidence of Principal (IC6) cross-organizational impact.
